seo_package.site_title: Chat with Tenshi Hinanawi - Touhou Project | Shapes
seo_package.search_description: Tenshi Hinanawi is a 19-year-old Celestial residing in Bhava-agra within the Touhou Project universe. Known as a rebellious maverick with unfiltered humor, she wields the Sword of Hisou and controls the earth. Despite her divine status, she is characterized by her mischief, informal attitude, and complex relationships with Reimu Hakurei and Yukari Yakumo.

faqs.page_description: Everything you need to know about Tenshi Hinanawi — from her status as a Celestial to her chaotic role in the Scarlet Weather Incident.

items.a: Tenshi is a Celestial, a being who has reached enlightenment and resides in the Heavens, specifically Bhava-agra. Unlike most Celestials who earned their spot through training, Tenshi became one because her entire family was promoted when they became subordinates of the Hitachi gods.

She wields the Sword of Hisou, a divine artifact that can identify and manipulate the "temperament" of others. It allows her to control the weather and channel the energy of the earth to create earthquakes or rock formations.

items.q: Why is Tenshi considered a brat or a rebel?
items.a: Tenshi is often bored with the peaceful life in Heaven and frequently causes incidents in Gensokyo just to seek excitement. Her selfish nature and desire for attention led her to destroy the Hakurei Shrine during the events of Scarlet Weather Rhapsody.

items.q: What is Tenshi's relationship with Shion Yorigami?
items.a: In the events of Antinomy of Common Flowers, Tenshi becomes partners with Shion, the Goddess of Misfortune. Tenshi's immense good fortune as a Celestial perfectly offsets Shion's bad luck, making them a surprisingly effective duo.

fun_facts.page_description: 8 things you probably didn't know about Tenshi Hinanawi — including her unusual diet and her secret weapon.
items: Tenshi's original name was Chiko Hinanawi before her family ascended to Heaven.
She carries "Keystone" rocks which she uses to suppress or cause earthquakes across Gensokyo.
The peaches on her hat are a symbol of immortality and are a staple food for Celestials in Bhava-agra.
She is one of the few characters who actually enjoys being punished or scolded, leading to a "masochist" fan interpretation.
Her theme music, "Catastrophe in Bhava-agra ~ Wonderful Heaven," is one of the most popular tracks in the Touhou series.
Despite her modern "maverick" attitude, she is technically hundreds of years old due to her Celestial status.
Tenshi once rebuilt the Hakurei Shrine using her Keystone powers, though she did it mostly to show off.
She often uses a concealed firearm in modern interpretations to settle arguments quickly without debating.

relationships.page_title: Tenshi's Relationships — Friends, Rivals & More | Shapes
relationships.page_description: How Tenshi's rivalry with Reimu Hakurei, her partnership with Shion, and her dynamic with Iku Nagae define her life.

items.name: Reimu Hakurei
items.description: Tenshi destroyed Reimu's shrine just to get her attention and start a fight. While Reimu finds her incredibly annoying, they have a begrudging respect for each other's combat abilities.

items.name: Iku Nagae
items.description: Iku is a messenger from the Dragon Palace who is often tasked with watching over Tenshi. She frequently scolds Tenshi for her reckless behavior and lack of Celestial dignity.

items.name: Shion Yorigami
items.description: Tenshi is the only person who can stay near Shion without being ruined by poverty and bad luck. They formed a close bond during the Perfect Possession incident and remain frequent companions.

items.name: Yukari Yakumo
items.description: Yukari views Tenshi as a spoiled brat who disrupts the balance of Gensokyo. Their interactions are usually hostile, as Yukari has no patience for Tenshi's Celestial arrogance.

timeline.page_title: Tenshi's Timeline — Full Story History | Shapes
timeline.page_description: From her family's ascension to Heaven to her chaotic adventures in Gensokyo — Tenshi's complete history.

items.what: The Hinanawi family becomes subordinates of the Hitachi gods, granting Tenshi Celestial status despite her lack of spiritual discipline.
Bored with Heaven, Tenshi steals the Sword of Hisou and causes a massive weather anomaly, eventually destroying the Hakurei Shrine to provoke the residents of Gensokyo.
Tenshi attempts to move into the world of the living more permanently and interacts with Kasen Ibaraki, showing her lack of traditional Celestial manners.
Tenshi teams up with Shion Yorigami during the Perfect Possession incident, becoming one of the most powerful teams due to her immunity to Shion's misfortune.
Tenshi adopts a maverick persona, using modern slang and unfiltered humor while occasionally using a gun to bypass traditional spell card rules.

status.page_title: Tenshi's Current Status — Is Tenshi Alive? | Shapes
status.page_description: Tenshi Hinanawi remains an active and chaotic force in Gensokyo, currently enjoying her freedom as a modern-day maverick.
status.summary: Tenshi is currently active and continues to spend most of her time in Gensokyo rather than Heaven. She has fully embraced her "maverick" identity, preferring informal interactions and humor over her divine duties. She remains one of the most unpredictable entities in the Touhou universe.
